bio: I'm Siva — a product and technology leader focused on building secure, intelligent systems that respect the people who use them.

Over the last decade I've worked across cloud-native platforms, applied AI, and large-scale payment systems. I care deeply about engineering culture, mentorship, and shipping work that holds up under real-world load.
When I'm not behind a keyboard you'll find me speaking at conferences, mentoring up-and-coming engineers, or writing about the craft of building software.

experience.summary: Leading the platform group: API strategy, cloud architecture, and the rollout of AI-powered customer experiences.
Architected the next-generation payments platform serving millions of daily transactions across multiple regions.
Built core services and tooling for a growing fintech, learning the craft of reliable, secure distributed systems.
